task: place the grasped pink block inside the left cabinet
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white cabinet with an open door is on a wooden surface. A pink block is on the wooden surface near the cabinet. The cabinet has a white interior. STRATEGY - First, reach for and grasp the pink block. Then, transport it to the open cabinet. Finally, place the block inside the cabinet. Failure modes include dropping the block during transport or misaligning it with the cabinet interior. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the pink block at its body for initial contact. Step 2 grasp the pink block at its body for secure hold. Step 3 transport the pink block to the cabinet's interior. Step 4 place the pink block inside the cabinet's interior.
Goal: inside(pink_block, cabinet)
Scene: pink_block, cabinet, wooden_surface
Step 1: reach(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pink_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pink_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink block
  contact: holding(pink_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_block)
Step 3: transport(pink_block -> cabinet)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the cabinet
  spatial: inside(pink_block, cabinet) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_block)
  done_when: inside(pink_block, cabinet)
Step 4: place(pink_block -> cabinet)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the cabinet
  contact: surface_contact(pink_block, cabinet) [completion]; released(pink_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_block, cabinet) AND released(pink_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the pink block
the body of the pink block
an empty area inside the cabinet
an empty area inside the cabinet
